privileged_info_summary: No metadata field exists in task.json to verify. Task setup creates synthetic data with 12 films in mixed duration formats. Verified facts: (1) Film dataset contains exactly 12 films with titles, directors, genres, and durations in multiple formats (pure numeric: '45', '105', '82', '38', '118', '52'; time format HH:MM: '1:35', '2:10', '1:25'; abbreviated: '2h 15m', '1h 50m'; text: 'about 95 minutes'). (2) All duration conversions in verifier.py test cases are mathematically correct (e.g., '2h 15m' = 135 min, '1:35' = 95 min). (3) Venue information is accurate: Main Theater capacity 150, Gallery Space capacity 50. (4) Buffer calculation rule verified: 15 min Q&A + 5 min transition = 20 min total matches verifier expectation of Duration_Minutes + 20. (5) Valid time slots correctly specified as 2:00 PM, 4:00 PM, 6:30 PM, 8:30 PM with appropriate duration windows. (6) Discrepancy found: README (line 48) examples ('90', '1:45', 'about 105 minutes', '2h 10m') do not match actual setup data which contains different format examples ('45', '1:35', 'about 95 minutes', '2h 15m'). Data is fully synthetic, created dynamically in setup_task.sh.
